zh.Emyngton, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾艾明頓
zh.Emmington, Thames, Oxfordshire, England,: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾艾明頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex於1306年9月28日出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾艾明頓時，他的父親Andrew Sackville20歲，母親Joan Mortimer14歲。他和Joan Burgeis至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1370年9月23日享年63歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex于1306年9月28日出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾艾明頓时，他的父亲Andrew Sackville20岁，母亲Joan Mortimer14岁。他和Joan Burgeis至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1370年9月23日享年63岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex was born on 28 September 1306, in Emmington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Andrew Sackville, was 20 and his mother, Joan Mortimer, was 14. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Joan Burgeis. He died on 23 September 1370, at the age of 63, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex est né le 28 septembre 1306, à Emmington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Andrew Sackville, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Mortimer, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Burgeis. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1370, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex am 28. September 1306 in Emmington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew Sackville 20 und seine Mutter Joan Mortimer 14. Er hatte mit Joan Burgeis mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. September 1370 im Alter von 63 Jahren und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex è nato il il 28 settembre 1306 nel Emmington, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Andrew Sackville, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joan Mortimer, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Joan Burgeis. Morì il 23 settembre 1370, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussexが1306年9月28日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエンミントンで生まれた時，父Andrew Sackvilleは20歳，母Joan Mortimerは14歳であった。彼はJoan Burgeisとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1370年9月23日に63歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex(이)가 1306년 9월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 에밍턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Sackville(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Mortimer(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Joan Burgeis(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 9월 23일 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.28 September 1306–23 September 1370: 28 de setembro de 1306–23 de setembro de 1370
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex nasceu em 28 de setembro de 1306, em Emmington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Andrew Sackville, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Mortimer, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Joan Burgeis. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1370, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex родился 28 сентября 1306 г. в местности эммингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Andrew Sackville было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Mortimer, 14. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Joan Burgeis. Он умер 23 сентября 1370 г. в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.28 September 1306–23 September 1370: 28 de septiembre de 1306–23 de septiembre de 1370
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Sackville Sheriff of Sussex nació el 28 de septiembre de 1306, en Emmington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Andrew Sackville, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan Mortimer, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Joan Burgeis. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1370, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
